productDisplayName: Fila Men's Single Tipped Woven Navy White Track Pant
description: CompositionNavy blue track pants made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, mesh lining, two insert pockets on the sides, appliqued brand logo on left leg, contoured white piping across the back that flows down the side seams and has zippered slits on the leg hemsFitRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water Do not bleach Tumble dry on low heat Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on print Train better in these navy blue tracks from fila. The soft and broad elasticated waist band sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to further customize the fit. These polyester tracks stay dry during long active days, while the mesh lining keeps it breathable. Team it with Sports t-shirts and fitness shoes for a great workout session.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 42"Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
